sections.paragraph:
ῥόδον, ου, τό (Hom. Hymns et al.; Lucian, Nigrin. 32; ins: BCH 10, 461, 101 [364 b.c.]; Sb 7541, 10 [II a.d.]; PIand 66, 7; Sb 1080; a Jewish-Gk. ins fr. Tell el Yehudieh: ZNW 22, 1923, 282 no. 19, 7; LXX; TestSim 6:2; JosAs cod. A 16:8; 18:7 [p. 64, 7; 68, 10 Bat.]) rose ἐρυθρότερος παντὸς ῥ. ApcPt 3:8 (cp. En 106:2; 10).—B. 527. DELG.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

BCH BCH = Bulletin de correspondance hellénique—List 6

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

PIand PIand = Papyri Iandanae—List 4

Gk. Gk. = Greek

  1. fr. = from

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestSim TestSim = Testament of Simeon, s. Test12Patr—List 2

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

Bat. Bat. = PBatiffol, s. JosAs—List 5

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

En En = I Enoch—List 2

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 906
